title: Audit, harden, test, reinstall, and release the Agentic SDLC plugin
acceptance: Audit all source, schemas, templates, documentation, packaging, and tests for correctness and consistency
Reproduce and fix every in-scope defect found without introducing hardcoded project-specific behavior
Exercise unit, end-to-end, negative-path, package, installed-plugin, and CLI smoke checks
Keep public behavior, documentation, schemas, and version metadata aligned
Commit and push the verified changes with a clean worktree
